sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n95694" key="spaqi/ouros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σπᾰθ-ίουρος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῐ], <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n95694.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sword-tail</tr_>, name of an animal (tapering towards the tail) that kills mice, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0671.tlg001:32:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philum.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Ven.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">32.2</biblScope> </bibl> ( <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg013:32" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">13.32</biblScope> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
